clusters.title: Timeline based on CCTV shows movements of Australian man charged with murdering Thai teen
clusters.neutral_headline: Australian 'lived normal life' before allegedly dumping Thai teen's body
bullet_summary: 48pm – allegedly shows Carman dragging the suitcase out of the buildingAustralian man charged with murder in Thailand after teenage girl’s body found in suitcase Continue reading
Reported by Guardian Australia, ABC News Australia

items.title: Timeline based on CCTV shows movements of Australian man charged with murdering Thai teen
items.standfirst: CCTV footage released by Pattaya City police shows an Australian man's movements after he allegedly dumped the body of a teenage girl in a suitcase in Thailand. The video allegedly shows Simon Peter Carman, 46, holding hands in a condo lobby with Tunchanok Donhomla shortly after 3.30am on Thursday. CCTV footage from later Thursday evening – between 9.25pm and 9.48pm – allegedly shows Carman dragging the suitcase out of the buildingAustralian man charged with murder in Thailand after teenage girl’s body found in suitcase Continue reading...
items.content: CCTV footage released by Pattaya City police shows an Australian man's movements after he allegedly dumped the body of a teenage girl in a suitcase in Thailand. The video allegedly shows Simon Peter Carman, 46, holding hands in a condo lobby with Tunchanok Donhomla shortly after 3.30am on Thursday. CCTV footage from later Thursday evening – between 9.25pm and 9.48pm – allegedly shows Carman dragging the suitcase out of the buildingAustralian man charged with murder in Thailand after teenage girl’s body found in suitcase Continue reading...

items.title: Australian 'lived normal life' before allegedly dumping Thai teen's body
items.standfirst: Australian Simon Peter Carman "lived his normal life", going out, washing his clothes and talking to neighbours after allegedly murdering a teenage girl and stuffing her body inside a suitcase in Thailand, police say.
items.content: Australian Simon Peter Carman "lived his normal life", going out, washing his clothes and talking to neighbours after allegedly murdering a teenage girl and stuffing her body inside a suitcase in Thailand, police say.
